results.title: Safe Drinking Water, Wildfire Prevention, Drought Preparedness, and Clean Air Bond Act of 2024.
subject: Safe Drinking Water, Wildfire Prevention, Drought Preparedness, and Clean Air Bond Act

extras.impact_clause:
An act to add Division 50 (commencing with Section 90000) to the Public Resources Code, relating to safe drinking water, wildfire prevention, drought preparedness, and clean air, by providing the funds necessary therefor through an election of the issuance and sale of bonds of the State of California and for the handling and disposition of those
		  funds, and declaring the urgency thereof, to take effect immediately.

results.latest_action_description: Chaptered by Secretary of State. Chapter 83, Statutes of 2024.

votes.motion_text: Do pass, but first be re-referred to the Committee on [Governance and Finance]
SB 867 Allen Third Reading Urgency By Garcia
Do pass as amended and be re-referred to the Committee on [Natural Resources]
Do pass, but first be re-referred to the Committee on [Appropriations]
